task.question: What was the result of the game?
initial_trace_steps: At 00:12, I identified the two teams with the different colors of their jerseys: white and black. Throughout the video, the white and black teams competed against each other, until at 01:43 - 01:58, I saw the white team victoriously storm the floor and celebrate together. Then, at 02:11 - 02:21, I saw the white team pose together for a photo with an award plaque before jumping around and celebrating together. All of this behavior indicates that the white team won the game.
